leaf_basis: Internet Archive page/n{leaf}_w500.jpg. For body pages, printed_page = leaf + 449. leaf 322 is excluded; leaf 321 is the back cover and has no printed_page.
notes: Current reader section ids are taken from reader-prototype/data/epilog_reader.json.
All confirmed/range/chapter rows in this pass were checked against Archive scan images/contact sheets generated from page/n{leaf}_w500.jpg.
The local pages.jsonl/page-level OCR is useful as text evidence but is offset by +1 against Archive scan leaves for body pages; scan leaves below use direct Archive n{leaf} numbering.
Chapter guides, translator notes, and synthetic closing sections are not treated as ordinary catalog entries.
Rows with leaf_ranges mark non-contiguous visible source spans inside one reader section; leaf_start/leaf_end keep an enclosing range for simple consumers.

anchors.evidence: 中文译者说明为 reader 侧说明文字，没有对应 Archive 原书条目页。
